infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ErrandGo accesses your photo library to let you attach a picture of the item for your errand — for example, a photo of a prescription label or grocery product — so your runner knows exactly what to collect.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ErrandGo uses your camera to take a photo of the item you need picked up — for example, a picture of a prescription bottle or a grocery list — so runners can identify exactly what to collect for your errand.
